name: Hawaiian Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. In a large bowl, mix together the flour, baking soda, salt, and cinnamon.
3. In another bowl, combine the sugar, oil, eggs, mashed bananas, crushed pineapple, and vanilla extract until well blended.
4. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the wet mixture, stirring continuously until the batter is smooth.
5. Fold in the chopped nuts.
6. Pour the batter into two greased loaf pans.
7. Bake for 1 hour and 15 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center of the loaves comes out clean.
8. Allow the bread to cool in the pans for 10 minutes before removing and transferring it to a wire rack to cool completely.
Makes 2 loaves.
